# Omar Haddad

Omar Haddad leads data and analytics in Acme Corp's finance function and is the quiet hinge of the engagement's internal politics. He reports to CFO Victor Lin, which gives him outsized informal influence: when Omar tells Victor the emissions data is solid enough to stand behind, Victor's skepticism softens.

Omar is hands-on with the GHG accounting methodology, owns the activity-data pipeline, and is the consultant's main technical counterpart for emission-factor decisions. Supportive of doing the baseline properly, he is also the person most exposed if the numbers later need to be restated.
